_doc: MAC 即時民調 question -> canonical question_key mapping for scraper/scrapers/mac_poll_scraper.py. 'match' is a distinctive whitespace-free substring of the question text (matched against the PDF question with all whitespace stripped). 'kind' is informational only; the scraper auto-detects binary-vs-multi from the table shape. For binary questions the stored 3-option aggregate uses positive_en/negative_en for the directional labels (zh comes from the PDF header) and the canonical 未明確回答 / 'No response' for the no-opinion bucket. For multi-option questions, options_en maps each non-no-opinion zh label to English. Unrecognised questions are flagged and skipped, never guessed. Add an entry here when MAC introduces a new recurring question; no code change needed.

questions.text_en: Do you approve of the CCP's 'One Country, Two Systems' proposal, which would treat Taiwan as a local/special administrative government under CCP rule and end the existence of the Republic of China?

questions.match: 失去自由民主也沒有關係
questions.text_en: Do you agree it would be acceptable to accept China's 'One Country, Two Systems' / 'peaceful unification' even if it means Communist Party rule and the loss of freedom and democracy?
Do you approve of the CCP's recent obstruction of the ROC president's chartered flight to a diplomatic ally?

questions.match: 是台灣還是中共在破壞台海和平
questions.text_en: In your view, is it Taiwan or the CCP that is undermining peace in the Taiwan Strait?

questions.match: 維持台海和平穩定現狀
questions.text_en: Do you support the view that Taiwan's top priority now is maintaining the cross-strait status quo of peace and stability?
Do you agree that the Republic of China and the People's Republic of China are not subordinate to each other?
Do you support the view that Taiwan's future must be decided collectively by its 23 million people?
Given the CCP's continued ~7% annual defence-spending growth, do you support the government increasing the defence budget to strengthen Taiwan's self-defence?
